name: Button
dont_use_when: Navigation between pages;Ghost for primary actions

name: Navigation Bar
use_when: Top-level site navigation on every page
dont_use_when: In-app dashboard navigation — use sidebar instead

name: Hero Section
accessibility: h1 for headline;meaningful alt on images

name: Feature Card
accessibility: heading hierarchy;alt on images;focus on link
use_when: Showcasing features or benefits in a grid
dont_use_when: Long-form content;More than 6 cards in a grid

name: Social Proof Bar
accessibility: alt text on logos;aria-hidden on decorative
use_when: Below hero to build trust;B2B logo strips

name: Code Block
use_when: Displaying code snippets or terminal commands
dont_use_when: Short inline code — use code element instead

name: Form Input
use_when: Any text entry — names emails passwords
dont_use_when: Selecting from predefined list — use Select

name: Toggle Switch
use_when: Binary on/off settings with immediate effect

name: Alert
use_when: Persistent contextual messages within a page

name: Accordion
dont_use_when: Content users need to compare across sections

name: Dropdown Menu
dont_use_when: Form field selection — use Select instead

name: Skeleton
dont_use_when: Button loading — use spinner;Errors — use error pattern

name: Data Table
dont_use_when: Simple lists;Mobile with more than 4 columns

name: Command Palette
use_when: Power-user keyboard navigation for large apps

name: Side Navigation
use_when: Dashboard apps with deep page hierarchies
dont_use_when: Marketing pages;Apps with fewer than 5 pages

name: Drawer
use_when: Side panel for navigation or detail views

name: Popover
use_when: Contextual content anchored to trigger element
dont_use_when: Complex forms — use Modal;Long content — use Drawer

name: Combobox
dont_use_when: Fewer than 5 options — use Select or Radio

name: Alert Dialog
dont_use_when: Non-blocking feedback — use Toast or Alert

name: Carousel
use_when: Image or content rotation with manual controls
dont_use_when: Critical content users must see — use static layout

name: Chip Input
accessibility: role=listbox for chips;aria-label;Delete removes chip;input has combobox role
dont_use_when: Single value entry — use Input;Fixed options — use Select

name: Stepper
dont_use_when: Fewer than 2 steps;Non-sequential tasks — use Tabs

name: Segmented Control
dont_use_when: More than 5 options — use Select;Non-exclusive — use Checkbox group

name: Toolbar
accessibility: role=toolbar aria-label;Arrow keys navigate;Tab enters/exits group
use_when: Grouped action buttons with shared context
dont_use_when: Single action — use Button;Navigation links — use Nav

name: Tree View
dont_use_when: Flat lists — use Data Table;Shallow nesting — use Accordion

name: OTP Input
dont_use_when: General text input — use Input;Long codes — use standard input

name: Box
accessibility: Layout primitive for spacing and composition
use_when: Comprehensive layout — use Grid or Stack

name: Stack
accessibility: Flex layout with consistent gap;Complex grid — use Grid

name: Grid
accessibility: CSS Grid layout;Simple list — use Stack

name: Divider
accessibility: Visual separator;Decorative only without semantic break

name: Number Input
use_when: Free text — use Input;Sliders — use Slider

name: Slider
dont_use_when: Discrete steps — use Select or Stepper

name: Rating
use_when: Star or custom icon rating input
dont_use_when: Binary — use Toggle;Free text — use Input

name: List
dont_use_when: Complex tables — use Data Table;Nested — use Tree View

name: Image
use_when: Images with fallback and aspect ratio

name: Chip
dont_use_when: Input with chips — use Chip Input

name: Timeline
dont_use_when: Simple list — use List;Steps — use Stepper

name: Aspect Ratio
dont_use_when: Free layout — use Box or Image

name: Popconfirm
dont_use_when: Simple tooltip — use Tooltip;Full dialog — use Alert Dialog

name: Icon
use_when: Icon wrapper with size/color from tokens
